title: Notice of Office Closure.24 (PDF)
text:
NOTICE OF OFFICE CLOSURE
This notice serves to inform industry and all clients of
the Vanuatu Financial Services Commission that the
Companies House will be closed for business on
Thursday, 28th November 2024.
We apologies for any inconvenience this may cause.
The Companies House will be open again for
business on Monday 02nd December 2024.
We thank you for your continued support and
understanding.
Yours Sincerely,
Branan Karae
Commissioner
